data.body: `src/app/beats/to-active-agent-info.ts:8-44` calls `normalizeAgentIdentity` at display time on raw fields, and `src/app/beats/use-agent-info-map.ts:33,60` then runs the result through it AGAIN on already-canonical capsule fields that Knots already stamped from the lease. This is duplicate normalisation. The display layer must read what is already on the artifact, not re-derive. See parent foolery-2e97 contract rule 5 (runtime/session metadata is autostamp-derived) and rule 8 (Foolery only extracts at lease setup).
data.title: Stop re-normalising agent identity at display time (beats)
